title: lastrea catoptera
intro: Lastrea catoptera, also known as the cat's ear or lady fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The medicinal properties of Lastrea catoptera have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it beneficial for reducing inflammation and protecting against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Lastrea catoptera are typically made by drying the fronds and using them as a tea or infusion, or by combining them with other herbs to create a tonic or tincture.
